title: You Make Your Worst Money Moves After 9PM
hook: After 9PM your brain's willpower is basically gone — and every online retailer knows exactly when to hit you.
angle: Decision fatigue as a measurable, exploitable financial vulnerability with a simple schedule-based fix — no budgets, no willpower required
audience: Anyone who has ever woken up to regret a late-night online purchase
key_numbers: 200+ daily decisions drain your willpower by 9PM
$1,800 saved per year by blocking shopping apps after 8PM
